chunks.text: ![Regulatory Affairs Professionals Society Logo](https://www.raps.org/static/101e2bda-0c63-416f-9c947a6af340a61e/2026RAPS-50-H-Full-Color.webp) ![BK-RegIntelReimagined-PDT- square - New.JPG](https://www.raps.org/static/1d3216fe-6061-4520-a65e86f8162f8951/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/BK-RegIntelReimagined-PDT-square-NewJPG.jpg) ### [Regulatory Intelligence Reimagined](https://www.raps.org/product/regulatory-intelligence-reimagined.html) A cutting-edge reference for mastering regulatory intelligence in the age of AI. This 28-chapter guide combines expert insights with real-world stories and practical frameworks. [Learn More](https://www.raps.org/product/regulatory-intelligence-reimagined.html) ![FRA-fullcolor 380 x 277.png](https://www.raps.org/static/382ae176-d5b5-4b70-a849bb89e6c54e14/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/FRA-fullcolor-380-x-277.png) ### [Introducing the FRA credential](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/fra.html) Our new assessment-based certificate is designed for early-career regulatory professionals. [Learn More](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/fra.html) ![2026-JRA-Q1-PDT-300x250.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/a69efca4-7ef9-4727-9d521b06c586ba26/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/2026-JRA-Q1-PDT-300x250.jpg) ### [Journal of Regulatory Affairs](https://www.raps.org/news-insights/journal.html) A bimonthly, peer-reviewed publication providing in-depth, evidence-based content, exclusive to RAPS members. [Check it out](https://www.raps.org/news-insights/journal.html) ![CE_H_Collab-Comm_380x300.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/1e7b8497-6c20-4fa8-8227b8a9a804a2d8/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/CEHCollab-Comm380x300.jpg) ### [Collaborative Communities](https://connect.raps.org/communities/collaborative-communities) Join one of the many groups where you can pursue your regulatory passions with people who share your interests. [Get Involved](https://connect.raps.org/communities/collaborative-communities) ![CR_H_Career-Resources_380x300.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/0b132115-b3da-418b-bf47e093b3e44e61/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/CRHCareer-Resources380x300.jpg) ### [Help with your career transition](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources.html) Navigating the regulatory job market? These resources can help. [Learn More](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources.html) ![rf-fullcolor.png](https://www.raps.org/static/326100aa-a8a6-41c8-88b0edfd6bcc8eed/71105bac-1b8d-495b-8eef58dd76d1920e/rapsresourcebannerlogo_9b0b3184dc59d50e4e10531d04b5ac6c_4a7c7e45a350/rf-fullcolor.png) ![rf-fullcolor.png](https://www.raps.org/static/326100aa-a8a6-41c8-88b0edfd6bcc8eed/71105bac-1b8d-495b-8eef58dd76d1920e/rapsresourcebannerlogo_9b0b3184dc59d50e4e10531d04b5ac6c_4a7c7e45a350/rf-fullcolor.png) # Industry seeks clarity on FDA’s standards recognition process for regenerative medicines #### Related topics ![rf-fullcolor.png](https://www.raps.org/static/326100aa-a8a6-41c8-88b0edfd6bcc8eed/71105bac-1b8d-495b-8eef58dd76d1920e/300x76_highestperformance__4a7c7e45a350/rf-fullcolor.png) [Subscribe](https://www.raps.org/my-raps/preferences.html) Welcome member! [Learn more about your benefits](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/membership/about-my-membership.html) ### Quick Links Share on social ### Recommended content ![Gene_Therapy_260602_iStock.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/69c7ec4d-5160-4967-b69d887cb59d323a/resourcegridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/GeneTherapy260602iStock.jpg) #### [FDA aims to speed gene therapy development with prior scientific knowledge guidance](https://www.raps.org/resource/fda-aims-to-speed-gene-therapy-development-with-prior-scientific-knowledge-guidance.html) The US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has proposed guidance on the types of scientifically valid prior knowledge sponsors should consider when developing certain gene therapies (GT). The agency said the recommendations in the guidance are intended to improve review efficiency and help accelerate product development. ![RegulatoryRecon_440x248.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/a590c465-cdda-4276-b84d93c9cb2fe4ac/resourcegridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/RegulatoryRecon440x248.jpg) #### [Recon: FDA reject’s Cingulate’s ADHD drug over manufacturing issues; Travere licenses Everest kidney disease drug for up to $1.14B](https://www.raps.org/resource/recon-fda-reject-s-cingulate-s-adhd-drug-over-manufacturing-issues-travere-licenses-everest-kidney-disease-drug-for-up-to-1-14b.html) Welcome to Regulatory Reconnaissance, your regulatory news and intelligence briefing. ![Lab_Mouse_260601_iStock.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/ae8d6339-9fd3-4afe-b4846384fbc59f47/resourcegridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/LabMouse260601iStock.jpg) #### [FDA oncology draft guidance aims to reduce animal testing](https://www.raps.org/resource/fda-oncology-draft-guidance-aims-to-reduce-animal-testing.html) The US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has proposed guidance to reduce the need for animal testing in the development of oncology drugs as part of its broader efforts to reduce animal testing in drug development.
